case_title: REYES MARQUEZ VS. THE ORIGINAL FRONT ROOM, et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARQUEZ, REYES AS TO DEFENDANT THE ORIGINAL FRONT ROOM, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP QUINTANILLA, RICARDO AKA RICHARD, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS A GENERAL PARTNER OF THE ORIGINAL FRONT ROOM, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP QUINTANILLA, CATRINA INDIVIDUALLY AND AS A GENERAL PARTNER OF THE ORIGINAL FRONT ROOM, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP RICARDO QUINTANILLA, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARQUEZ, REYES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE ORIGINAL FRONT ROOM, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP QUINTANILLA, RICARDO AKA RICHARD, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS A GENERAL PARTNER OF THE ORIGINAL FRONT ROOM, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP QUINTANILLA, CATRINA INDIVIDUALLY AND AS A GENERAL PARTNER OF THE ORIGINAL FRONT ROOM, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP RICARDO QUINTANILLA, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $22,910.53 PRINCIPAL, $135.99 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $23,416.52, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
